title: Vacspare for Numatic Henry Vacuum Cleaner Tool Kit with 3m Hose, Brushes & 10 Hoover Bags
features: Vacspare Compatible Numatic vacuum cleaner full tool kit + 10 vacuum paper bags
Complete replacement tool kit for your vacuum cleaner

Kit includes: 1 x 3m extra long stretch hose, 1 x stair tool, 1 x Crevice tool, 1 x Dusting brush, 1 x Tool adaptor, 2 x Chrome extension rods, 1 x Chrome bent end, 1 x 270mm wide floor tool & 10 x Vacuum paper dust bags
Fits Numatics with 32mm diameter tools, including the following models: Henry, Hetty, George, Rucksack, Edward, Basil
Please note this part is a non genuine compatible spare part and the manufacturers’ names and part numbers have been used for reference purposes only
